affected_files.purpose: Added testimonials.7.name, testimonials.7.location, testimonials.7.text keys (Spanish — original text)
Added testimonials.7.name, testimonials.7.location, testimonials.7.text keys (English translation)
Added testimonials.7.name, testimonials.7.location, testimonials.7.text keys (Chinese translation)
Added new testimonial object for Paul Quinteros (initials PQ, Firebase photo URL, no summitDate) to the testimonials array

testimonial.name: Paul Quinteros
testimonial.original_text_es: 1000 gracias por todo hermano te agradezco bastante y si es que estás en Ecuador no dudes en avisarme que que yo te recibo ahí con todo el cariño y todo todo el aprecio estimado Julián
testimonial.translated_text_en: 1000 thanks for everything brother, I really appreciate it, and if you are ever in Ecuador do not hesitate to let me know — I will welcome you with all the love and appreciation in the world, dear Julián.
testimonial.translated_text_zh: 千万个感谢，兄弟，非常感激你。如果你有机会来厄瓜多尔，一定告诉我，我会用全部的爱和敬意来迎接你，亲爱的Julián。

report: Added Paul Quinteros (Ecuador) testimonial as entry #7 in the carousel. Modified src/i18n/es.ts, src/i18n/en.ts, and src/i18n/zh.ts to include the new testimonials.7.* translation keys. Registered the new testimonial object in src/components/Testimonials.astro with initials PQ, the provided Firebase Storage photo URL, and no summit date. The carousel renders the new slide automatically via the existing map() loop. No regressions to existing testimonials 1–6.
assumptions: No summit date was provided for Paul Quinteros — summitDate set to undefined, consistent with testimonials 2, 3, 5, 6.
The next available testimonial key was 7 (key 4 was previously skipped in the codebase).
English and Chinese translations were generated based on the Spanish original text.
